product.name: ArSport Dry
product.titleDescriptor: Polyester Fast Dry Interlock Knit Fabric
product.specLine: 140 g/m², 100% Polyester Fast Dry, Interlock Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArSport Dry is 100% Channeled Polyester interlock knit fabric for team uniforms. The special channeled poliester fiber gives fast dry function to the fabric. To reduce to odor formation the fabric is coated on two side by antibacterial agents.
It is suitable for sublimation printing.
Polyester Fast Dry Interlock Knit Fabric
140 g/m², 100% Polyester Fast Dry, Interlock Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensinal Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | TS EN ISO 5077
Permeability to Air | >2500 mm/s | EN ISO 9237
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

acceptedMatches.rationale: Product explicitly certified and labeled as high-visibility per EN ISO 20471.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antibacterial coating is mentioned but no medical or healthcare use is stated, so it does not meet the explicit-use requirement.
Explicit stated end use as police uniform fabric, directly matching the uniformed-services/police inclusion criterion.
Explicitly described as a sports knit for team uniforms within the ArSport sportswear family.

evidence: descriptions: 'interlock knit fabric for team uniforms'
categorySourceGroup: Functional knit interlock polyester fabrics
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly a sports knit designed for team uniforms, positioning sport as the dominant commercial application.

secondary.rationale: Explicit certification to EN ISO 20471 for high visibility supports an independent secondary application, also reflected in the Police Uniform application field and image label.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Police Uniform is stated as an application field, but the product's core design and family framing is sportswear (team uniforms), not specifically uniformed-service tactical gear.
Antibacterial coating is present but no medical or healthcare end use is stated.
No general industrial workwear use is stated; product is framed as sports/team uniform fabric.

modelOutput.reviewReason: Product data mixes sport (team uniform) framing with explicit hi-vis certification and a police-uniform application field, creating ambiguity about whether military/police should be primary instead of sport.
